title: pkg/domain: Add terminal support for FreeBSD
body:
This just moves the code to files which can be shared with freebsd.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Restarted two test failures, probably flakes.

LGTM
A few tests are still failing - I'll take a look over the weekend.

I rebased to trigger a retest and that seems to work. I don't think the rebase fixed anything - the failing tests were all 'podman search' tests which depend on the health of external services such as docker.io and quay.io so hard to avoid flakiness.
